<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title (or commits) follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
      (`feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` / `chore:`…) — **releases and the changelog
      are generated from them**
- [ ] `npm test` and `npm run typecheck` pass
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No credentials, tokens or personal data in code, fixtures or logs
- [ ] User-facing changes are reflected in the README
